$schema-note: Canonical surface-class -> approved-typeface map (the drift detector, machine-readable). The consumer drift-guard reads this to ENFORCE that a repo only loads the font families approved for its surface class, so the deviation table can't be violated silently. Prose narrative + rationale live in the README. One system, few voices; anything off this file is a bug.

scoreboard-broadcast.notes: Scoped subsystem only; not general UI.

company-landing.notes: Approved editorial voice. Target end-state = these 3 families only. Currently 5 load (also Inter + Space Grotesk, live on /privacy + /terms) — see tracked follow-up.

marketing-demo.notes: Approved marketing identity (distinct from the app-side). Barlow Condensed is LIVE via the .watermark logo — not dead load.

dark-saas.notes: Space Grotesk header = Architect-scoped brand exception (repo section 2.4); ratified. Dead Barlow load pending tier-2 removal.

outOfScope.st-patricks-armonk: Client parish brand (Fraunces headings + Inter body) — carries the client's brand, not Aster's. Not a consumer of @aster/tokens.

gateAmendment.resultVocabulary: Final/LIVE attached to a score or completed state (banned on invented data, ruling 1B).
gateAmendment.legitimate: Round names in schedule rows (Semifinal A, Final, Regional Finals — a matchup with time/court, no score) are legitimate tournament nomenclature, not results.
